nodes.label: The system shall allow all guest users to access the full course content without registration.
The system shall require all users to log in before accessing any course content.
The administrator shall create the course with a title.
The administrator shall manage the course update operations.
The instructor shall upload the course videos.
The student shall browse the courses by category.
The student shall enroll in the course after the payment completes.
The student shall access the course content after the enrollment succeeds.
The student shall track the course completion percentage.
The instructor shall create the quizzes with deadlines.
The student shall attempt the quizzes within the allowed time.
The student shall submit the assignments before the deadline expires.
The instructor shall provide the assignment feedback.
The student shall view the grades from the dashboard.
The student shall post the discussion forum reply.
The instructor shall send the announcements.
The instructor shall schedule the live classes.
The student shall download the completion certificate after fulfilling the requirements.
The administrator shall manage the student accounts.
The administrator shall generate the enrollment reports.
The student shall save the course to the wishlist.
The system shall load the course pages within 3 seconds under normal network conditions.
The system shall support at least 2000 users.
The system shall encrypt the user data using the AES-256 encryption.
The system shall authenticate the users every 24 hours.
The system shall log the login activity.
The system shall maintain 99.9% uptime on a monthly basis.
The system shall recover from the server failure within 5 minutes.
The system shall provide a responsive interface for mobile devices.
The system shall support the Chrome browser.
The system shall integrate with the YouTube platform.
The system shall operate on the AWS platform.
